batch_summary.note: Jan-Feb 2025 MEGA-CLUSTER: EP-0996 Jan 15 (106 msgs, FLOOD) + EP-0998 Jan 20 (22 msgs, FLOOD) + EP-1008 Feb 4 (5 msgs) + EP-1011 Feb 9 (68 msgs, FLOOD) + EP-1018 Feb 15 (164 msgs, FLOOD). 365 total hostile msgs in 32 days. Sev-3. Five hostile episodes in one 32-day window. ADD-003 Valentine's Day temporal window: EP-1018 is Feb 15 (day after Valentine's). RF-04 compound: B-022 contains 'you gaslight everything' DARVO-inversion (ROW-7740) — RF-09 Level E. RF-11 bilateral signal: Feb 15 admitted-incident (children hiding). Highest hostile episode density in dataset.

primary_flags.escalation_shape: ramp-and-cluster — 5 hostile episodes in 32 days; peak at EP-1018 (164 msgs, Feb 15)

delta_profile.sent_direction: Eli measured responses; not increasing message frequency
delta_profile.received_direction: 5 hostile episodes in 32 days; flooding in 4/5; peak 164-msg exchange on Valentine's Day +1
delta_profile.net_escalation: extreme Sev-3 (365 total hostile msgs in single 32-day window; five-episode cluster is unique in dataset)
delta_profile.de_escalation_resistance: EXTREME: Eli disengages after each episode; Melissa re-initiates at Jan 20, Feb 4, Feb 9, Feb 15 — four re-initiations. Within-episode resistance confirmed across all major episodes.

primary_flags.cycle_classification: CYC-003 Valentine's Day temporal window (EP-1018 Feb 15) + CYC-002 logistics triggers; five-episode cluster is maximum expression of the escalation pattern
primary_flags.cross_rf_note: B-022 contains RF-04 flags (including ROW-7724-7725, ROW-7740 'you gaslight everything' — RF-09+RF-04 compound). RF-09 Level E flag (B-022 S006) is DARVO-inversion within this hostile cluster. RF-11 S005 is Feb 15 bilateral signal (children hiding). Feb 2025 cluster is the most cross-RF compound period in Phase A.

arc_updates.event: Jan-Feb 2025: 5 hostile episodes / 365 msgs in 32 days. Highest hostile density in dataset. Following the Oct-Dec 2024 silence, hostility resumes at extreme level.
Five-episode cluster: Melissa = escalator/re-initiator all 5 episodes. Eli = de-escalator across 365 hostile msgs. Role consistency at maximum cluster scale.
Four re-initiations in 32 days after Eli disengagement. Maximum between-episode resistance in dataset.
